title: Security+
description: This mod adds more protection from hostile mobs.
body:
Note: this mod is called "More Security", although the logo says "Security+", due to the fact that the "+" symbol is not taken into account, and the mod with the name "Security" is already there.

Do you need more protection from hostile mobs? This mod is for you. This mod adds some technologies to protect your house.

All technologies:

Spikes. Spikes is a block that will damage mobs that stand on it. Its craft isn't hard. You just need 4 Iron Ingots and 2 Iron Nuggets.
Mine. Mine is a block that looks like a stone slab and will explode if it's powered with Redstone or if mob stands on it. Its craft is also easy. You need a stone slab and a TNT.
Mob Igniter. Mob Igniter is a block that works like this: if it's powered with Redstone, it will place fire block 1 block higher than it is. It's craft is harder. You need 1 dispenser, 1 Block of Iron, 2 Redstone Dusts and 1 Flint and Steel.
Wire. Wire is a block that can be passed through, but it will damage everyone if someone passes it. To craft it you need 1 Block of Iron Bars and 8 Iron Nuggets that surround it.
This mod also adds new villager called Engineer and his house. He doesn't live in villages. To make him you need his table called Engineer's Table. This block like a Fletching Table doesn't have any GUIs.

If you found an error, write it in the comments and I'll try to fix it.
